payload.match_name: Man City vs Arsenal, Premier League 2026
payload.description: Erling Haaland scored a thunderous volley from 25 yards out. The ball rocketed into the top corner leaving the Arsenal keeper with no chance. It was his 12th goal of the season and a statement finish.
payload.context: City were dominating possession but Arsenal were defending deep. Haaland's goal broke the deadlock.
payload.fantasy_impact: Haaland owners got 10 points for the goal plus 3 bonus points. Must-have captain material.

payload.match_name: Liverpool vs Man United, Premier League 2026
payload.description: Mohamed Salah stepped up to take a crucial penalty with Liverpool leading 1-0. His shot was well-saved by Andre Onana who dived to his left. The Anfield crowd groaned as Salah held his head in his hands.
payload.context: Liverpool were pushing for a second goal to kill the game. The miss gave United hope.
payload.fantasy_impact: Salah lost 2 points for the missed penalty. Onana gained 5 save points and a clean sheet bonus.

payload.match_name: Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund, UCL Semi-Final
payload.description: Jude Bellingham scored a dramatic last-minute winner against his former club. He received the ball on the edge of the box, beat two defenders with a silky dribble, and curled the ball into the far corner.
payload.context: 1-1 in the dying minutes of the semi-final first leg. Bellingham's goal gave Madrid a crucial advantage.
payload.fantasy_impact: Bellingham delivered 13 points including goal, assist, and bonus. A differential captain gem.

payload.description: Bukayo Saka produced a masterclass against Chelsea, scoring a brilliant hat-trick. His first was a composed finish, the second a curling effort from outside the box, and the third a calm penalty.
payload.context: Arsenal were looking to close the gap on league leaders. Saka's hat-trick essentially won the match by half-time.
payload.fantasy_impact: Saka owners were rewarded with 20 points. Triple captain territory for sure.

payload.match_name: Man United vs Liverpool, Premier League 2026
payload.description: Bruno Fernandes received a straight red card for a reckless studs-up challenge on Alexis Mac Allister. United were already trailing 2-0 and the red card effectively ended any chance of a comeback.
payload.context: United under pressure at home. The red card meant they played the entire second half with 10 men.
payload.fantasy_impact: Bruno lost 3 points for the red card. A disaster for the 35% of managers who captained him.

payload.match_name: Man City vs Newcastle, Premier League 2026
payload.description: Kevin De Bruyne delivered a pin-point 40-yard pass to Phil Foden who controlled it brilliantly and finished past the keeper. The assist showcased De Bruyne's world-class vision.
payload.context: City were searching for a breakthrough against a stubborn Newcastle defense.
payload.fantasy_impact: De Bruyne got 6 points for the assist and 3 bonus points. Essential midfield pick.

payload.match_name: Arsenal vs Tottenham, North London Derby
payload.description: Martin Odegaard scored a stunning free-kick that bent over the wall and dipped into the top corner. The Tottenham goalkeeper was rooted to the spot as the ball nestled in the net.
payload.context: Early North London derby tension. Odegaard's goal set the tone for a dominant Arsenal performance.
payload.fantasy_impact: Odegaard returned 9 points. A solid differential captain for the derby.

payload.description: Marcus Rashford came off the bench for Liverpool and scored within 5 minutes. A blistering run down the left wing ended with a powerful near-post finish. The Liverpool fans chanted his name.
payload.context: Liverpool needed a winner against a resilient Brighton side.
payload.fantasy_impact: Rashford's super-sub appearance gave 8 points from limited minutes. Great bench boost.

payload.match_name: Bayern Munich vs Man City, UCL Quarter-Final
payload.description: Erling Haaland scored a clinical header from a corner. He rose highest above two Bayern defenders and directed the ball into the bottom corner. Bayern's keeper had no chance.
payload.context: City leading 1-0 away in Munich. Haaland's header doubled the advantage before half-time.
payload.fantasy_impact: Haaland with another haul - 10 points and 3 bonus. Essential for UCL fantasy.

payload.match_name: Chelsea vs Man United, Premier League 2026
payload.description: A calamitous own goal by Chelsea's defender who tried to clear a Marcus Rashford cross but sliced it into his own net. The Chelsea goalkeeper could only watch in despair.
payload.context: United were applying pressure and the own goal gifted them the lead.
payload.fantasy_impact: Rashford was credited with the assist for the own goal. 4 points total.

payload.match_name: Man City vs Liverpool, Premier League 2026
payload.description: Ederson made a spectacular diving save to deny Darwin Nunez a late equaliser. The save preserved City's clean sheet and earned them all three points in a tight title race encounter.
payload.context: City leading 2-1. Nunez had a clear one-on-one chance.
payload.fantasy_impact: Ederson owners celebrated 4 clean sheet points plus a save point. Goalkeepers can win you FPL.

payload.match_name: Tottenham vs Arsenal, North London Derby
payload.description: Declan Rice scored a screamer from 30 yards out. The ball took a slight deflection and looped over the Tottenham goalkeeper. Rice celebrated passionately in front of the away fans.
payload.context: Arsenal leading 1-0. Rice's incredible strike sealed the derby victory.
payload.fantasy_impact: Rice's goal plus clean sheet bonus gave 11 points. A must-own defensive midfielder.
